phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fish section is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a secção de peixes?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SEH-sown DIH PAY-shihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: A peixaria abre cedo para garantir o peixe mais fresco do dia.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao feirante ou ao gerente do piso.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW OW zheh-RAYNG-tih DOO PEE-zoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the market vendor or the floor manager.

responses.english: Ask the market vendor or the floor manager.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW OW zheh-RAYNG-tih DOO PEE-zoo.
responses.french: Pergunte ao feirante ou ao gerente do piso.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the unified checkout is
phrases.cultural_note: O pagamento centralizado agiliza a saída e aceita cartões e multibanco.

likely_response.local: A caixa unificada fica no Pavilhão Central.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH KEYE-shuh oo-nee-fee-KAH-duh FEE-kuh NOO puh-vee-LYOWN sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: The unified checkout is in the Central Pavilion.

responses.english: The unified checkout is in the Central Pavilion.
responses.phonetic: AH KEYE-shuh oo-nee-fee-KAH-duh FEE-kuh NOO puh-vee-LYOWN sayngt-RAHL.
responses.french: A caixa unificada fica no Pavilhão Central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the wine counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de vinhos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH VEE-nyoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: O balcão de vinhos oferece provas de rótulos regionais da Bairrada e Dão.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Balcão de Vinhos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH VEE-nyoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the wine counter.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the wine counter.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH VEE-nyoosh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Balcão de Vinhos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the unified checkout is
phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde fica o check-out unificado?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW SHEHK-OHWT oo-nee-fee-KAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: The unified checkout at Coimbra Municipal Market is centrally located for convenience, a common feature in Portuguese markets.

likely_response.translation_en: In the Central Pavilion, at the center.

responses.english: In the Central Pavilion, at the center.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fish section is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a secção de peixaria?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SEH-sown DIH pay-shuh-REEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese markets, the fish and meat sections are often adjacent for logistical reasons.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Secção de Peixaria.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH-sown DIH pay-shuh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Fish Section.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Fish Section.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH-sown DIH pay-shuh-REEUH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Secção de Peixaria.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the wine counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de vinhos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-jee FEE-kah oo bal-KOWN jee VEEN-yohs
phrases.cultural_note: The wine counter is part of the Tascas area on the upper floor, a social hub in the market.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, nas Tascas do Piso Superior.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUHSH TAHSH-kuhsh DOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the Taverns on the Upper Floor.

responses.english: Good morning, at the Taverns on the Upper Floor.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUHSH TAHSH-kuhsh DOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR.
responses.french: Bom dia, nas Tascas do Piso Superior.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the weighing scale is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a balança de pesagem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH buh-LAHNNG-suh DIH peh-ZAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: A pesagem é obrigatória antes de embalar produtos a granel.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a caixa unificada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH KEYE-shuh oo-nee-fee-KAH-duh?

likely_response.local: A caixa unificada está no Pavilhão Central. Siga as placas.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH KEYE-shuh oo-nee-fee-KAH-duh ehs-TAH NOO puh-vee-LYOWN sayngt-RAHL. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: The unified cashier is in the Central Pavilion. Follow the signs.

responses.english: The unified cashier is in the Central Pavilion. Follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: AH KEYE-shuh oo-nee-fee-KAH-duh ehs-TAH NOO puh-vee-LYOWN sayngt-RAHL. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh.
responses.french: A caixa unificada está no Pavilhão Central. Siga as placas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the upstairs taverns are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as tascas no piso superior?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH TAHSH-kuhsh NOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR?
phrases.cultural_note: O espaço coletivo no piso superior promove convívio entre locais e turistas.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para as Tascas do Piso Superior.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH TAHSH-kuhsh DOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the Upstairs Taverns.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the Upstairs Taverns.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH TAHSH-kuhsh DOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas para as Tascas do Piso Superior.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fish section is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a secção de peixaria do mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SEH-sown DIH pay-shuh-REEUH DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Mercados municipais em Portugal organizam os frescos por alas específicas para higiene e fluxo.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar uma balança de pesagem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OO-muh buh-LAHNNG-suh DIH peh-ZAH-zhayng?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um feirante ou ao caixa do mercado.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW OW KEYE-shuh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a market vendor or the market cashier.

responses.english: Ask a market vendor or the market cashier.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW OW KEYE-shuh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
responses.french: Pergunte a um feirante ou ao caixa do mercado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the upstairs taverns are
phrases.text_local: Podem indicar a localização das tascas do piso superior?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN DUHSH TAHSH-kuhsh DOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR?
phrases.cultural_note: As tascas no andar superior servem comida tradicional a preços acessíveis.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, piso superior junto às escadas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR ZHOONNG-too UHUHSH SHKAH-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, upper floor next to the stairs.

responses.english: Good morning, upper floor next to the stairs.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR ZHOONNG-too UHUHSH SHKAH-duhsh.
responses.french: Bom dia, piso superior junto às escadas.
